introSection: Aska was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Nara Dreamland in Nara, Nara, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride featured the Cyclone layout, based on the Cyclone at Luna Park.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains where manufactured by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters.

fullText:
Aska was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Nara Dreamland in Nara, Nara, Japan.

The ride featured the Cyclone layout, based on the Cyclone at Luna Park.

The trains where manufactured by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters.
